Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1800 "FROGGER93-1800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Frogger '93.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Breakpoint to use for dumping is $1228. However, jumping to $1800 to start the game skips the high score loading from disk. Also removed the call to the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $1A6A by replacing with an RTS instruction, which removes the high score saving to disk.
